messages.content: 绘本共读《家人回来了》，认识三角形 翻译成英文
Reading together the picture book "Family is Coming Home" and learning about triangles.
探索陆地上的交通工具，制作小汽车手工 翻译成英文
Explore Land Vehicles and Make a Handmade Car.
学习儿歌《巴士》 翻译成英文
Learn the children's song "The Wheels on the Bus" in English.
绘本共读《小红帽与大灰狼》，认识乘坐公共汽车时的规则 翻译成英文
Reading a picture book "Little Red Riding Hood and the Big Bad Wolf", learning about the rules of riding a public bus.

绘本共读《饥饿的狐狸》，学习复述故事。
翻译成英文
Reading the picture book "The Hungry Fox" together, learning to retell the story.

认识警察这一职业的工作内容及学会感恩警察的付出。
翻译成英文
Understanding the job responsibilities of a police officer and learning to appreciate their sacrifices.

与孩子一起阅读《饥饿的狐狸》，鼓励孩子用自己的方式去复述故事。
翻译成英文
Read "The Hungry Fox" with your child and encourage them to retell the story in their own way.
绘本共读《超级电视迷》，学会辨识虚构事物 翻译成英文
Reading the picture book "Super TV Fan" together, learning to identify fictional elements.
了解电视的发展史，设计未来的电视 翻译成英文
Learn about the history of television and design the television of the future.

绘本共读《跳芭蕾舞的牛》，体会梦想的意义和坚持的价值。
翻译成英文
Reading the picture book "The Cow Who Danced Ballet" together, experiencing the meaning of dreams and the value of persistence.
